title: lathyrus elongatus
intro: Lathyrus elongatus, also known as the narrow-leaved peacock's tail or slender pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus elongatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
